request_kinds.label: Partner intel
request_kinds.description: Pull recent signals across SharePoint + Outlook + OneDrive for one partner.

request_kinds.label: Contract delta
request_kinds.description: Compare the latest contract draft against the prior version; flag substantive changes.

request_kinds.label: Governance comparison
request_kinds.description: Compare a clause type (MFN, MG, exclusivity) across multiple partners.

request_kinds.label: Meeting summary
request_kinds.description: Summarize a recent meeting / call thread for a partner with action items.

request_kinds.label: Morning brief supplement
request_kinds.description: Generate a supplemental morning brief covering overnight signals.

request_kinds.label: Freeform brain analysis
request_kinds.description: Open-ended analytical request; specify what you want and the bounds.
